content: Phase 1: POC - Write backend test script validating anomaly detectors + storage + notifications (isolation)
Phase 1: POC - Fix until all detectors + persistence + notification dispatch pass
Phase 2: Backend - Add `anomaly_threshold_policy` rule type + seed defaults in business_rules_service
Phase 2: Backend - Create services/anomaly_service.py with detectors + storage + scan orchestration
Phase 2: Backend - Create routers/anomalies.py + register + add perms to catalog
Phase 2: Backend - Wire live hooks in outlet_service.validate_sales + procurement_service.post_gr
Phase 2: Backend - Create seed/seed_phase7d_demo.py + inject anomalous fixtures
Phase 2: Frontend - Create Anomaly Feed page (/finance/anomalies) + detail drawer + triage
Phase 2: Frontend - Create Executive Anomaly Overview Widget + wire to Executive Home
Phase 2: Frontend - Create Admin Anomaly Thresholds editor (/admin/configuration/anomaly-thresholds)
Phase 2: Frontend - Add sub-nav tabs and routes in FinancePortal + AdminPortal
Phase 2: All user stories (US-7D-1..6) covered in Development
Phase 2: End-to-End Testing using testing_agent_v3 + fix all issues
Phase 2: Update plan.md + PRD.md changelog + create PHASE_7D_RESULT.md
